when_to_try: ordinary branch or section with stable signed net throughflow and no persistent local exchange above calibrated tolerance
required_inputs: signed mdot; p or section pressure; T_bulk; wall T or q_flux; local properties; reset distances; orientation; source-status fields
required_gates: Re; Pr; Gr; Gr_star; Ri; Ra; Gz; reverse_area_fraction; reverse_mass_fraction; secondary_flow_metric; pressure and heat residuals
can_predict: branchwise pressure drop, bulk temperature, developing friction, developing heat transfer, source-status diagnostics
cannot_predict: resolved counterflow topology, recirculation-cell residence time, bistable exchange states
output_name_policy: f_DeltaP_section or Nu_candidate only with source envelope; FD values remain reference
next_agent_lane: implement source-envelope and diagnostic precheck before any branchwise closure bakeoff

when_to_try: corner, bend, reducer, expansion, tee, junction, or close-coupled cluster with positive net throughflow and defined extraction domain
required_inputs: static or reduced-static pressure planes; hydrostatic correction; kinetic correction; straight/developing reference; exact geometry; velocity basis; recovery-plane sweep; reverse-flow metrics
required_gates: component-isolation flag; pressure basis; velocity basis; recovery errors; reverse_area_fraction; reverse_mass_fraction; signed branch flow; same-QOI uncertainty
can_predict: geometry-specific section or cluster loss and effect on loop pressure
cannot_predict: universal component K, internal recirculation temperature, bidirectional exchange
output_name_policy: use K_section or K_cluster unless component isolation and recovery are demonstrated
next_agent_lane: pressure/corner extraction row for basis, recovery, and component isolation

when_to_try: discrete modeled branch changes sign or one-node junction fails to reproduce path pressure reversal
required_inputs: local pressure nodes; signed path mass flows; path velocity bases; split ratio; topology state; junction geometry
required_gates: signed mdot for each branch; pressure-drop reversal; topology consistency; mass conservation; hysteresis/switching check
can_predict: negative net branch flow, path pressure reversal, topology-dependent junction resistance
cannot_predict: wall/core counterflow inside one branch, local recirculation-cell temperature, universal reverse-flow onset
output_name_policy: use path-specific K/head-change fields, not scalar tee K
next_agent_lane: signed-flow network design only after evidence shows negative net branch flow

source_use_category: proposed TAMU reduced architecture; source-supported method only
when_to_try: persistent local reverse area/mass or near-zero-throughflow exchange invalidates one bulk state while no discrete branch net reversal is available
required_inputs: main-stream mdot and T; recirculation volume; recirculation temperature; exchange mass flow; residence time; R_mu/R_rho; wall heat/source terms
required_gates: persistent reverse_area_fraction/reverse_mass_fraction; coherent recirculation volume; stratification; residence time; pressure/energy residual; held-out validation
can_predict: localized storage/mixing, exchange with main stream, extra section resistance, slow thermal lag
cannot_predict: detailed 3D vortex field, uncalibrated bistability, universal exchange coefficients
output_name_policy: replace singular K near zero flow with dimensional resistance plus recirculation-cell energy ledger
next_agent_lane: upcomer/corner recirculation reduced-model design after CFD cell evidence exists

when_to_try: repeatable positive-direction periodic fitting response with unchanged topology
required_inputs: time-resolved mdot; mean/amplitude/frequency; steady section K; pressure or dissipation terms
required_gates: periodicity; positive mean; no zero crossing; single dominant frequency; topology unchanged; source range overlap
can_predict: period-averaged fitting loss under bounded periodic pulsation
cannot_predict: startup, chaotic oscillation, reversal topology, exchange flow
output_name_policy: K_unsteady_mean only as transient term separated from inertance
next_agent_lane: defer until transient pressure/flow evidence exists

when_to_try: verified full-order CFD ensemble exists and one-dimensional closures cannot represent spatial state cheaply enough
required_inputs: verified FOM; snapshot ensemble; fields; boundary parameters; mode/compartment definitions; held-out validation
required_gates: FOM verification; snapshot coverage; retained-energy or mode criterion; conservation error; extrapolation detector
can_predict: fast interpolation/reconstruction within trained envelope; reduced closure states
cannot_predict: unseen topology/physics, universal extrapolation, predictive accuracy without FOM validation
output_name_policy: ROM_state or compartment exchange terms must retain pressure/energy ledger decomposition
next_agent_lane: archive-design and ROM intake lane only after FOM verification package exists
